LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS EQUILON ENTERPRISES, LLC AND SHELL OIL COMPANY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND REQUEST TO STAY ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. THE ACTION ARISES AT LEAST IN PART UNDER THE PARTIES ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. THE ARBITRATOR CAN DETERMINE WHAT IF ANY CLAIMS IN THE CASE DO NOT ARISE UNDER THE AGREEMENT AND IF ANY SUCH CLAIMS SURVIVE THE ARBITRATION THEY MAY THEN BE LITIGATED IN THIS ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS EQUILON ENTERPRISES, LLC AND SHELL OIL COMPANY'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request To Stay Action Pending Arbitration IS GRANTED. THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. THE ACTION ARISES AT LEAST IN PART UNDER THE PARTIES ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. THE ARBITRATOR CAN DETERMINE WHAT IF ANY CLAIMS IN THE CASE DO NOT ARISE UNDER THE AGREEMENT AND IF ANY SUCH CLAIMS SURVIVE THE ARBITRATION THEY MAY THEN BE LITIGATED IN THIS ACTION. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/LB
